summary: Recent studies do not provide sufficient evidence linking increased carotid pulsatility or resistance indices directly to early vascular abnormalities in young obese males, though underlying metabolic factors may contribute indirectly. Current findings suggest these indices typically indicate more advanced pathology rather than serving as reliable early biomarkers in this population.
